topic: the change is always slow, for me it took me a while to understand that recycling is important and we should do it
location: Valencia, Spain (Ruta Corts, Marxalenes, San Antonio)

secondary.relevance: items found on street as decor

thematic_elements: slow change and patience with oneself
recycling bins as part of daily street landscape
finding discarded items that still have life (artificial plant)
golden hour / sunset as metaphor for gradual change
suggested_natural_phrases: reciclar no es solo separar basura
cada vez que paso por aquí veo lo mismo
antes me daba igual, ahora no puedo no verlo
Valencia tiene contenedores por todos lados
una planta artificial al lado del contenedor
givore_mention_guideline: 20% casual — the topic is recycling awareness which connects naturally to Givore's mission. One brief, organic mention (e.g., 'apps like Givore help' or showing the app screen) fits the reflective tone. Do not force it.
